channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: HaifaSSH - SSH Session Manager - Sun Jul 12 14:48:57 UTC 2026
item.description:
HaifaSSH — a full SSH session manager, built into your IDE Stop juggling a separate terminal app. HaifaSSH brings a fast, organized, multi-tab SSH workflow right into...
vendor: HaifaSoft downloads: 6 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.haifasoft.haifassh

item.title: Deploy Toolkit - Thu Jul 16 05:20:44 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Deploy Toolkit downloads: 5 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.deploytoolkit.idea

item.title: LanguageManager - Thu Jul 16 07:24:35 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: CreamGod45 Artifacts downloads: 13 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: cg.creamgod45.LanguageManage

item.title: Titanium - Thu Jul 16 00:43:01 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: Provenance Recorder - Wed Jul 15 22:34:12 UTC 2026

vendor: Aaryan Mehta downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.aaryanmehta.provenance.recorder

item.title: Cockpit for GitLab - Thu Jul 16 09:34:00 UTC 2026

item.description:

vendor: Navneet downloads: 5 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.scheduler.task-scheduler

item.title: MdLens - Thu Jul 16 23:50:07 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.description:

vendor: Mustackable.dev downloads: 4 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.mustackable.forgettostagemenot

item.title: Sapling SCM Integration - Thu Jul 16 02:03:47 UTC 2026
